review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: I loved the brown sugar cinnamon latte and the protein balls! All their ingredients are super clean with no filler ingredients. I can’t wait to go back to try more items on their menu!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: A very nice place to grab coffee with some friends! The staff was very kind and complimented my hair which is always a way to my heart. I got the cold brew, which was reasonably priced and very tasty. It was pretty heavy on ice, which was a bit annoying, but I’ve been trying to cut back on my caffeine intake recently so maybe that was them just helping me out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Jasmine!  Loved having you. ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: Gorgeous ambiance and yummy treats. I would come back especially for their iced coffee. Sweet staff as well.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind review!  Isabella is a gem and we are so fortunate to have her. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: So happy to have this cafe close by, I love raw crunch in Indian trail so it’s great to not have to make that drive now! Isabella was such a joy & so helpful!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Reilly!  We love Isabella and so glad that you did too- 😊 appreciate you taking the time to leave such a kind review!
reviews_data.review_text: Isabella was so helpful with her recommendations. The food is great and I loved her positive attitude

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marjorie so much for the review!  😊
reviews_data.review_text: Yum!  So excited I found this healthy alternative food establishment! Goat cheese egg bites are so delicious and the sourdough bread with avocado!  Yum Yum!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Muhamad!
reviews_data.review_text: So impressed with their subcontractor management ensuring everyone maintained the same high standards throughout our project! Jon's leadership kept quality consistent. Every trade performed excellently.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!  We love having you here Dan!  You are an official “regular”. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee is local & tastes amazing! Lauren has done an amazing job making this place feel very warm & welcoming. This has quickly become my go-to spot.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Liza for the awesome review!  We loved meeting you and your mom - and so happy you both got time together. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: We came here for brunch today and it was amazing!!! Super allergen friendly- I came with my mom and she’s gluten and dairy free, and she could eat sooo much of the food here!! Absolutely obsessed because it was all DELICIOUS too!! Everyone who helped us (especially LAURA) was so nice and thorough, and you could tell there was so much passion behind the restaurant too. Seed oil free options, all organic, and all AMAZING! Can’t wait to return :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Tara!  So glad we could feed the staff- looking forward to seeing you all again. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: LOVED EVERYTHING! Such a cute little hidden gem. Placed an office order with many different things and everyone absolutely LOVED their food. The ingredients were incredibly fresh and the customer service was amazing - we will all be returning customers!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Olivia for taking the time to leave a review!  Even the difficult ones to read leave room for growth and learning.  
Would love the opportunity to gather some additional details and to invite you back in on us for a better experience.  
If you are open to that you can connect with me directly.

Best,
Laura
laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text: Eden is a great concept, I wanted to try new places and support small businesses. Ik it’s organic but the the price is too high not to have anything special regarding their drinks and the up-charges is ridiculous. Secondly the owner from the spoons Acai side made it very difficult for me to enjoy the restaurant, I felt as if she was pestering me as soon as I stepped foot in the door. I also found it difficult to over hear her be very passive aggressive to the employees for little things, I feel bad for them they don’t deserve it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Molly for taking the time to leave a review!  We are so glad you loved it- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Genuinely the best matcha and acai bowl I've had in a long time. Perfect 5 stars all the way around. Fresh, balanced, and delicious.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Heidi!!!! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee is so rich, smooth, and flavorful! Absolutely worth the price. The Nutter Butter crepe was also delicious and the crepe was tender and fluffy. So good!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Ali!  We appreciate you taking the time to leave such a thorough and kind review!  
We did see an exceptionally busy weekend - appreciate your patience and we hope to see you soon!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating
review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
I have celiac and there's only two ingredients in this shop on the whole menu that contain gluten. Pretty much everything is gluten free (not the toast) and one of the specialty protein powders? (If my memory is correct).

We had the ham and cheese crepe, box of chocolates iced latte, and iced salted Carmel matcha. The crepe was to die for, the drinks exceeded expectations. Everything is delicious here.

There's a wait here because they have recently become popular but things were well worth the wait. Don't expect for some time on busy weekend times to get in and out quickly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Brian for the review and for the generous feedback!  We hope to see you again— 😊

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Really cool vibes. Almost everything on the menu is gluten-free except for the sourdough toast and a protein shake. Very happy to support a local business that cares about the well-being of others.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Flower for the kind review!  This was one of the most thoughtful, generous ones we have ever received.  Grateful!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is beautiful, inside and out.
We tried the strawberry matcha, a cinnamon brown sugar latte, and an açaí bowl, all three were refreshing, soft, and honestly hard to describe… just really, really good.
But what truly stood out was the service.
It was our first time, and the guy cashier was incredibly kind, patient, and knowledgeable about the menu. In a world where good service sometimes feels performative, this felt real. You can tell this place is built with care. We’ll definitely be back 🤍

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Gino for stopping in and for the 5 star review.  Means so much to us!  You may be spot on w the “Mommy-gram” this afternoon! 😉 sunny Friday, first day of Spring - EVERYONE was out and had to capture it.  Hope to see you again-

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area

reviews_data.review_text: Came here with my family. Food service and atmosphere was nice. Definitely family spot. I believe all of Mommy-gram was here when we visited.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kelcy!  So happy you made it in— appreciate the kind review. 💕
reviews_data.review_text: First time here and I’m already impressed! The coffee was fantastic, the atmosphere is adorable, and the girl at the counter was incredibly sweet. I placed a pickup order and everything was ready to go—super quick and easy. The owner, Laura, is such a kind soul, which really adds to the overall experience. I can’t wait to come back and try the food. Definitely recommend checking this place out! Plus, if you work in the plaza, you get 10% off when you come in and order, which is such a great perk!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dereka!  We loved having you and hope you enjoy that mani/pedi after too. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: I was having a really crappy morning and I tried to go to Amelie's but literally couldn't find a parking spot. While leaving the shopping center I saw Eden. LUCKY ME beacuse the thr heart throb acai bowl was AMAZING. The staff was friendly and the place spotless (I mean impeccably clean). The vibe is very chill and I like that the tables are spaced out enough that you can have a mommy meetup going at the same time as a people working or friends gabbing. YUM, I loved it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Leanne for taking the time to leave a review!  We appreciate the kind words so much.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Eden is such a pretty place to enjoy great food and delicious coffee. Everything was delicious and the staff is so friendly. Fabulous!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Viktoriya for taking the time to leave a review.  I am so sorry that you did not enjoy it!  We pride ourselves on not only the quality of the bean, but also high standards of our equipment and our staff.  I would love to invite you back in for a second visit on us if you are open.  We do not hear this feedback regularly and would be so grateful for another opportunity to wow you if you care to reach out directly. 

Best,
Laura 

laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text: Unfortunately, this was the worst coffee I have ever had. The taste was very unpleasant. As someone who truly enjoys coffee, I was excited to try something new, but both the flavor and the preparation process were extremely disappointing.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Nancy!  We love making your dreams come true. 😉. Appreciate the generous feedback.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: My kids and I love this place. This afternoon was the second time. The bananarama, brown eyes girl smoothies were amazing. As I told the owner today. Was dreaming about the bananarama ! One of my kids chose a ham and cheese crepe and the other an acai bowl called The Legend. Also picked up two coffees. A large vanilla latte and a Americano. The attention to detail and fresh ingredients make this place outstanding. We will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Rebecca! Grateful for your business and to have you as a neighbor.  Appreciate the kind review.
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful storefront, very friendly staff and my acai bowl was delicious and filling.  Very excited to have this nearby!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Awwwwww thank you so much Matthew!  This is awesome.  Can’t wait to have you back. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Best new Coffee shop in the Charlotte Matthew’s area! Fantastic Açaí and Crepes and heartwarming espresso!! Plus the loveliest staff you’ll have the pleasure visiting! Probably have to become a regular !!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Marcella for taking the time to leave a review - and for the kind words regarding the service and atmosphere! 
All of our coffee beans are fresh, locally roasted, and USDA certified organic - regularly tested to prevent any mold.
All of our milks are USDA certified organic, as well as our milk alternatives are free of gums, sweeteners, or fillers and contain minimal ingredients.
Our syrups are USDA certified organic and housemade from real ingredients.
We pride ourselves on no lab-created “natural ingredients”.
We do understand the cost may appear elevated and offer “no fluff”, but I promise the value in the quality is there. 
Coffee is IMPORTANT, we agree, and so is making sure you feel good about where you are getting it from!
Thank you again for the feedback- 😊
reviews_data.review_text:
Let me start by saying the service and atmosphere were great-

I was pretty disappointed to find out a 16oz specialty latte was priced at almost $11 dollars after tax, that is astounding. As someone who frequently visits different coffee shops in Charlotte, the drink was not anywhere close to that price point.

Fly Kid Fly and The Salty are 2 cafe’s that are priced higher than average in the area - but their specialty drinks come with either an additional cold foam topping, blue spirulina, marshmallow fluff etc.)

The coffee from Eden has no toppings or anything special other than the flavoring, I am unsure how the price is justified, but unfortunately I don’t think this is going to be a frequent stop for me when other nearby cafes offer more for higher priced drinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Michelle!  Great choice and so glad you loved it.  That Blue Spirulina is the most nutritiously dense superfood on our menu- 😉. Appreciate you taking the time to leave a review.
reviews_data.review_text: The Legend was a 10/10 for me! Fresh and so high quality!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Gabby!!! It was so fun to see you both back again today.  See you tomorrow? 😉🥰
reviews_data.review_text: Great experience and great coffee

reviews_data.owner_answer: Wes we were so happy to see you all at Eden too!  Thank you so much for leaving such a generous review, and for the continuous support of us here!  Super grateful. 😊

review_questions.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: Eden is the continuation of my favorite açaí spot, Spoons. BUT, it now has amazing coffee too! The staff are always awesome, and one of the co-owners is always available in the store to talk to. Very great place for coffee or açaí bowls. Try the DJ Queen B next time you're there! :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Jen we love having you here!  Thank you so much for taking the time to leave such a kind review.  😊
reviews_data.review_text: This place is an absolute gem and passes all the hippy crunchy tests. Clean and transparent ingredients. Amazing vibes and LAURA the owner is just the sweetest most welcoming queen and all the baristas are just awesome. JUST GOOOO ❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Robert for taking the time to leave a review!  We love it too— come back and see us soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Love this spot!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Carol!  Thank you so much for your Spoons loyalty and for taking the time to leave a review.  

Our build your own bowl is priced congruently with all of our Spoons locations, and you are correct, we do offer additional base options here at Eden!

I located your delivery check and did notice that you chose to omit many of the included build your own toppings that did result in a smaller bowl.  

We definitely want to make sure you always have a great experience with us, and if you would like to contact me directly I would love to invite you back in!

Best,
Laura

laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text:
Updated review:
Shout out to Laura, the owner, for turning a not so good experience into a great one! She reached out for feedback and invited me back in to give them another try. This time I had the nut butter toast and egg bites along with a mini bowl. Everything was so good, but the best part is I ran into Laura while picking up my food, and she was just as courteous irl. It’s clear she’s passionate about her stores and sets a high bar. I look forward to coming back to try more of the menu!

Original review:
I am a frequent customer of Spoons, so when I saw they opened this sister restaurant with an expanded menu I was excited to give it a try. I ordered a BYO bowl off their app. It comes with 2 bases, but every other topping costs extra. Sadly, when my bowl arrived it wasn’t even halfway full. The taste was fine, but I was disappointed in the overall experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dorothy for taking the time to leave a review!  We agree!!!! Grateful for the kind words and the review.
reviews_data.review_text: The acai bowls are on a whole different level - amazing combination of flavors. And the salted maple latte is divine. If you love the salty and sweet combination, you definitley need to try it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Rebecca!
reviews_data.review_text: The chicken sausage egg bites were delightful, and my coffee was delicious. The service was extremely upbeat and friendly, all around it was a great way to start my day!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Andrew!  Thanks for the kind review.  Can’t wait for you to come back in for the crepes! 😊
reviews_data.review_text:
Coffee was delicious. Egg bites were just okay. Don’t think they are worth the price.
Will definitely return to try the crapes and bowls
Very cute atmosphere

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Erica!  So glad you are here. ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful service, food and coffee! Will be back lots :) New favorite spot for sure!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ellen for coming by and taking the time to leave such a kind review!  Can’t wait to see you again. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: So happy Eden is finally open in Carmel Commons. The coffee is legit—don’t sleep on the real caramel latte (Go half sweet, it has a subtle savory note and is SO good). Haven’t tried the food yet, but the menu looks great. The owners are lovely and clearly care about quality and ingredients. Amazing to finally have a real coffee shop in South Charlotte!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Sarah so much!  Love that you found a spot that feels like home.
reviews_data.review_text: A great place to "work from home." So yummy, and the coffee is great.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Fabian!  I am so sorry we missed you!  With the Charlotte “snow and ice storms” 😉, and following requests by the local authorities to stay off the roads we did halt business operations all day.  We made every attempt to communicate that to our customer base, and truly apologize that you were not notified.  I would love to invite you back in with your family to try us now that the city is back open, and the sun is shining!  If you are open to connecting directly you can email me at laura@spoons.com.  

Thank you!
Laura
reviews_data.review_text: I came woth my family all the way to try the food , but they didnt notify it was close . We Lost time . You guys should mark the place as closed the days you not open .

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Niyana for stopping in and for taking the time to leave us a generous review!  We hope to see you soon— we will keep the coffee flowing for you- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing atmosphere and kind staff. The coffee and crepes were awesome

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Yeah Montaya!!!! Thank you so much for the review and we are so glad you keep coming back.  You have picked some winners to try and looking forward to what you chose next….. 😊

Super grateful for the kind words and your business.
reviews_data.review_text: Nice quiet place with lots to offer. I have been here twice!! I had the Strawberry Matcha Latta, Suga baby and Pretty in pink. Everything was delicious!!! I will be back to try something else. The pricing matches the area it is in so no complaints.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kathy!  We love seeing you-
reviews_data.review_text: My new happy place! And the coffee is perfection!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi!  Thank you for taking the time to leave a review!  You are correct, they are protein shakes, yes frozen so very similar to a smoothie for sure!  We do assemble the shake ingredients prior to blending to take the wait out of the process for the customer.  We currently use Truvani Organic Whey Protein which does include dairy, HOWEVER, we have ordered their plant based protein to give customers an option and will add the protein at the end for those that prefer dairy free. While we have many dairy free options on both the coffee and acai bowl side of Eden, there are many just like you that do also prefer plant based for their protein shakes as well.   We are happy to make that a reality and apologize that we missed the mark with you this evening!
reviews_data.review_text: I was riding down the 51 and googled Smoothie near me and this place came up Eden, I was less than five minutes away, but I did have to turn around and come back. I was excited to try this new place that just opened up in November 2025, but they had no dairy free options for smoothies as a matter fact I’m not even sure if they have smoothies it’s listed as shakes so maybe that can be considered the same as Smoothie but there was no dairy free options. The mix is pre- made and you can’t order without whey protein. A wasted trip and I was a little disappointed, but I did get to meet and talk with some of the owners.🥲

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Shirley for the sweet review and for coming in this morning!  What a fantastic way to start our day.  See you soon! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Good Morning, A must you try. You should run over there and support this wonderful place. Beautiful Humans and Tasty Acai Bowls. Such a Comfortable and welcoming shop.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much!  What a spectacular review - so glad to be in the neighborhood- we all really love it and seeing you all daily.  😊
reviews_data.review_text: This restaurant opening in my neighborhood is one of the best things that’s happened to me in the last 3 years! Food and service is impeccable. I always leave there in a better mood. The owner is extremely involved and hands-on, always smiling and bringing the energy. Cannot praise this place enough. A great addition to the neighborhood!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Carly!  Appreciate the kind review- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Best açaí bowl I’ve had in a long time. The salts caramel matcha was amazing. Def will be back to try more menu items. Friendly and fast service

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Annatasshia for stopping in today!  Appreciate the generous feedback- see you soon!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area

reviews_data.review_text: Drove by and just spotted this new place. Coffee was great and atmosphere was clean and bright. The star was definitely the egg soufflés bites.A wonderful fresh cooked taste with clean ingredients. Way better than Starbucks. Plenty of outlets too! Will be coming back to work and have some coffee for sure.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marrissa!  Great picks— can’t wait to see you soon and appreciate the review so much.
reviews_data.review_text: I had the heart throb acai bowl and the sugar cookie caramel crumble latte, they were both to die for! I can't wait to go back and try other items, the menu and ingredients are top notch. 🙌🏻

reviews_data.owner_answer: Christian that is so awesome!!!  Thank you so much.  Come in and see us next time- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Very tasty - had a great "Champ" bowl and the "Pretty In Pink" smoothie... both were top notch! Didn't stop in (wasn't in store) but can vouch 100% for the actual products they serve.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ashley!  Cannot wait to see you again!  Appreciate the kind words and generous review.
reviews_data.review_text: My husband and I stopped by on a whim and I have got to say, the vanilla latte is fantastic, my husband loved his matcha latte, and I got the Berried Treasure bowl. Seriously delicious and I love that all of their ingredients are clean in everything they make. They pride themselves in that and it shows! It is not easy living with multiple allergies, but they are so allergen conscious even on their menu where it is distinctly shown under each menu item. From one entrepreneur to another, I salute you 🫡 Laura was so welcoming and I love what she and her husband are doing with the place 🫶🏻🥰

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for stopping in and for the review!
reviews_data.review_text: Eden is AMAZING! Best Açaí bowl I’ve ever had! The champ bowl is amazing! Hot food and coffee are also delicious and everything is organic. Cannot recommend enough!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kristen for stopping by and for the kind review!
reviews_data.review_text: Place was delicious! I came here for açaí bowls and a latte and it was exactly what I was looking for. Finding açaí bowls that aren’t too sweet can be a challenge. This place reminded me of a healthy cafe in LA !

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Carolyn!  Loved meeting you and your family and can’t wait to see you all again.  So grateful you found us.
reviews_data.review_text: We found this place due to a Nextdoor post from the owner’s mom and I’m so glad we found it. The best avocado toast I’ve had. Super fresh and delicious. My kids loved their crepes and my daughter enjoyed her matcha. So happy we live nearby so we can return often.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the generous review!  So glad you came in and loved the Bananarama!  I remember you traveled all the way from Uptown- and appreciate your dedication and commitment to quality and health.  Well done-
reviews_data.review_text: Loved the Bananarama  smoothie — creamy, naturally sweet, and super fresh. The space feels calm and bright, making it a great stop to pause and recharge. Quality ingredients and a peaceful vibe — highly recommend! The owner and team are warm, welcoming, and make the experience feel genuinely personal.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Stephanie!  We loved having you in.  🤍
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely loved our experience today! The coffee was amazing, as was the food. I got the Real Caramel Latte and the Chicken, Sausage, Cheddar Egg Soufflés. The owner and staff were so friendly!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Marion for the kind review!  So nice to see you again and super excited to meet your dad as well!  Grateful for your loyalty and business- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Laura and her team were amazing! We were welcomed right away, given recommendations, and they even brought our drinks out to us. The dining area is open and aesthetically pleasing, and the bathrooms are just as nice. Highly recommend for anyone who appreciates clean, high-quality ingredients.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Shawn!  We loved having you -
reviews_data.review_text: Acai bowl was great and grabbed a coffee on the way out. Service was A+ and helpful

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the review!  We love the bathrooms too! 😉
reviews_data.review_text: Super cute atmosphere, my mocha is delicious. My husband got the dirty chai and loved it. Daughter got the carnival ride smoothie bowl. Bougie restroom to boot. Highly recommend.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dr. Lee!  Appreciate the review! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: This place just opened and it’s great! We all loved the food we got and the service was friendly and prompt. Good food, good location and healthy!

reviews_data.owner_answer: This was so nice!!!!  We are so happy to be here and thanks for taking the time to leave a review.
reviews_data.review_text:
SO awesome and an answer to prayers! EVERY single item at Eden is organic, healthy and so delicious. Truly thankful for the dedication of this team to provide a beautiful atmosphere with healthy and delicious options for everyone!
⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Heather for coming in and for the AWESOME review!  So glad you enjoyed it- 😊

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Everything was delicious and meticulously prepared, from the organic coffee & espresso, crepes and Raw Crunch Bars to the decadent (yet somehow still healthy) bowls of acai, pitaya (dragon fruit), my favorite Reese's Crunch Protein Bar and more! Even after just a cappuccino and a bowl (mine was the Legend) on our first visit, it kept our hungry bellies happy for hours and hours - definitely a full meal and not just a dessert or snack.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Melissa!  We are so happy to be in the neighborhood!
reviews_data.review_text: Nice addition to the area. They have acai bowls, chia pitaya, smoothies, egg souflee and coffee!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Claire for the kind review!  Can’t wait to see you again- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious, fresh and healthy bowls AND great coffee!! I’ll be a regular for sure!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Cole for the great review!!
reviews_data.review_text: Healthy Food, Great Coffee, Good vibes

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Sophie!
reviews_data.review_text: Yummy bowls. Great environment and friendly staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the 5 stars and generous review!😊
reviews_data.review_text: Good coffee, tasty food, clean ingredients and friendly staff. Highly recommend.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: I loved the brown sugar cinnamon latte and the protein balls! All their ingredients are super clean with no filler ingredients. I can’t wait to go back to try more items on their menu!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: A very nice place to grab coffee with some friends! The staff was very kind and complimented my hair which is always a way to my heart. I got the cold brew, which was reasonably priced and very tasty. It was pretty heavy on ice, which was a bit annoying, but I’ve been trying to cut back on my caffeine intake recently so maybe that was them just helping me out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Jasmine!  Loved having you. ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: Gorgeous ambiance and yummy treats. I would come back especially for their iced coffee. Sweet staff as well.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the kind review!  Isabella is a gem and we are so fortunate to have her. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: So happy to have this cafe close by, I love raw crunch in Indian trail so it’s great to not have to make that drive now! Isabella was such a joy & so helpful!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Reilly!  We love Isabella and so glad that you did too- 😊 appreciate you taking the time to leave such a kind review!
reviews_data.review_text: Isabella was so helpful with her recommendations. The food is great and I loved her positive attitude

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marjorie so much for the review!  😊
reviews_data.review_text: Yum!  So excited I found this healthy alternative food establishment! Goat cheese egg bites are so delicious and the sourdough bread with avocado!  Yum Yum!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Muhamad!
reviews_data.review_text: So impressed with their subcontractor management ensuring everyone maintained the same high standards throughout our project! Jon's leadership kept quality consistent. Every trade performed excellently.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!  We love having you here Dan!  You are an official “regular”. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee is local & tastes amazing! Lauren has done an amazing job making this place feel very warm & welcoming. This has quickly become my go-to spot.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Liza for the awesome review!  We loved meeting you and your mom - and so happy you both got time together. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: We came here for brunch today and it was amazing!!! Super allergen friendly- I came with my mom and she’s gluten and dairy free, and she could eat sooo much of the food here!! Absolutely obsessed because it was all DELICIOUS too!! Everyone who helped us (especially LAURA) was so nice and thorough, and you could tell there was so much passion behind the restaurant too. Seed oil free options, all organic, and all AMAZING! Can’t wait to return :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Tara!  So glad we could feed the staff- looking forward to seeing you all again. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: LOVED EVERYTHING! Such a cute little hidden gem. Placed an office order with many different things and everyone absolutely LOVED their food. The ingredients were incredibly fresh and the customer service was amazing - we will all be returning customers!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Olivia for taking the time to leave a review!  Even the difficult ones to read leave room for growth and learning.  
Would love the opportunity to gather some additional details and to invite you back in on us for a better experience.  
If you are open to that you can connect with me directly.

Best,
Laura
laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text: Eden is a great concept, I wanted to try new places and support small businesses. Ik it’s organic but the the price is too high not to have anything special regarding their drinks and the up-charges is ridiculous. Secondly the owner from the spoons Acai side made it very difficult for me to enjoy the restaurant, I felt as if she was pestering me as soon as I stepped foot in the door. I also found it difficult to over hear her be very passive aggressive to the employees for little things, I feel bad for them they don’t deserve it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Molly for taking the time to leave a review!  We are so glad you loved it- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Genuinely the best matcha and acai bowl I've had in a long time. Perfect 5 stars all the way around. Fresh, balanced, and delicious.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Heidi!!!! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee is so rich, smooth, and flavorful! Absolutely worth the price. The Nutter Butter crepe was also delicious and the crepe was tender and fluffy. So good!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Ali!  We appreciate you taking the time to leave such a thorough and kind review!  
We did see an exceptionally busy weekend - appreciate your patience and we hope to see you soon!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating
review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
I have celiac and there's only two ingredients in this shop on the whole menu that contain gluten. Pretty much everything is gluten free (not the toast) and one of the specialty protein powders? (If my memory is correct).

We had the ham and cheese crepe, box of chocolates iced latte, and iced salted Carmel matcha. The crepe was to die for, the drinks exceeded expectations. Everything is delicious here.

There's a wait here because they have recently become popular but things were well worth the wait. Don't expect for some time on busy weekend times to get in and out quickly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Brian for the review and for the generous feedback!  We hope to see you again— 😊

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Really cool vibes. Almost everything on the menu is gluten-free except for the sourdough toast and a protein shake. Very happy to support a local business that cares about the well-being of others.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Flower for the kind review!  This was one of the most thoughtful, generous ones we have ever received.  Grateful!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is beautiful, inside and out.
We tried the strawberry matcha, a cinnamon brown sugar latte, and an açaí bowl, all three were refreshing, soft, and honestly hard to describe… just really, really good.
But what truly stood out was the service.
It was our first time, and the guy cashier was incredibly kind, patient, and knowledgeable about the menu. In a world where good service sometimes feels performative, this felt real. You can tell this place is built with care. We’ll definitely be back 🤍

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Gino for stopping in and for the 5 star review.  Means so much to us!  You may be spot on w the “Mommy-gram” this afternoon! 😉 sunny Friday, first day of Spring - EVERYONE was out and had to capture it.  Hope to see you again-

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area

reviews_data.review_text: Came here with my family. Food service and atmosphere was nice. Definitely family spot. I believe all of Mommy-gram was here when we visited.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kelcy!  So happy you made it in— appreciate the kind review. 💕
reviews_data.review_text: First time here and I’m already impressed! The coffee was fantastic, the atmosphere is adorable, and the girl at the counter was incredibly sweet. I placed a pickup order and everything was ready to go—super quick and easy. The owner, Laura, is such a kind soul, which really adds to the overall experience. I can’t wait to come back and try the food. Definitely recommend checking this place out! Plus, if you work in the plaza, you get 10% off when you come in and order, which is such a great perk!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dereka!  We loved having you and hope you enjoy that mani/pedi after too. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: I was having a really crappy morning and I tried to go to Amelie's but literally couldn't find a parking spot. While leaving the shopping center I saw Eden. LUCKY ME beacuse the thr heart throb acai bowl was AMAZING. The staff was friendly and the place spotless (I mean impeccably clean). The vibe is very chill and I like that the tables are spaced out enough that you can have a mommy meetup going at the same time as a people working or friends gabbing. YUM, I loved it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Leanne for taking the time to leave a review!  We appreciate the kind words so much.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Eden is such a pretty place to enjoy great food and delicious coffee. Everything was delicious and the staff is so friendly. Fabulous!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Viktoriya for taking the time to leave a review.  I am so sorry that you did not enjoy it!  We pride ourselves on not only the quality of the bean, but also high standards of our equipment and our staff.  I would love to invite you back in for a second visit on us if you are open.  We do not hear this feedback regularly and would be so grateful for another opportunity to wow you if you care to reach out directly. 

Best,
Laura 

laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text: Unfortunately, this was the worst coffee I have ever had. The taste was very unpleasant. As someone who truly enjoys coffee, I was excited to try something new, but both the flavor and the preparation process were extremely disappointing.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Nancy!  We love making your dreams come true. 😉. Appreciate the generous feedback.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: My kids and I love this place. This afternoon was the second time. The bananarama, brown eyes girl smoothies were amazing. As I told the owner today. Was dreaming about the bananarama ! One of my kids chose a ham and cheese crepe and the other an acai bowl called The Legend. Also picked up two coffees. A large vanilla latte and a Americano. The attention to detail and fresh ingredients make this place outstanding. We will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Rebecca! Grateful for your business and to have you as a neighbor.  Appreciate the kind review.
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful storefront, very friendly staff and my acai bowl was delicious and filling.  Very excited to have this nearby!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Awwwwww thank you so much Matthew!  This is awesome.  Can’t wait to have you back. 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Best new Coffee shop in the Charlotte Matthew’s area! Fantastic Açaí and Crepes and heartwarming espresso!! Plus the loveliest staff you’ll have the pleasure visiting! Probably have to become a regular !!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you Marcella for taking the time to leave a review - and for the kind words regarding the service and atmosphere! 
All of our coffee beans are fresh, locally roasted, and USDA certified organic - regularly tested to prevent any mold.
All of our milks are USDA certified organic, as well as our milk alternatives are free of gums, sweeteners, or fillers and contain minimal ingredients.
Our syrups are USDA certified organic and housemade from real ingredients.
We pride ourselves on no lab-created “natural ingredients”.
We do understand the cost may appear elevated and offer “no fluff”, but I promise the value in the quality is there. 
Coffee is IMPORTANT, we agree, and so is making sure you feel good about where you are getting it from!
Thank you again for the feedback- 😊
reviews_data.review_text:
Let me start by saying the service and atmosphere were great-

I was pretty disappointed to find out a 16oz specialty latte was priced at almost $11 dollars after tax, that is astounding. As someone who frequently visits different coffee shops in Charlotte, the drink was not anywhere close to that price point.

Fly Kid Fly and The Salty are 2 cafe’s that are priced higher than average in the area - but their specialty drinks come with either an additional cold foam topping, blue spirulina, marshmallow fluff etc.)

The coffee from Eden has no toppings or anything special other than the flavoring, I am unsure how the price is justified, but unfortunately I don’t think this is going to be a frequent stop for me when other nearby cafes offer more for higher priced drinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Michelle!  Great choice and so glad you loved it.  That Blue Spirulina is the most nutritiously dense superfood on our menu- 😉. Appreciate you taking the time to leave a review.
reviews_data.review_text: The Legend was a 10/10 for me! Fresh and so high quality!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Gabby!!! It was so fun to see you both back again today.  See you tomorrow? 😉🥰
reviews_data.review_text: Great experience and great coffee

reviews_data.owner_answer: Wes we were so happy to see you all at Eden too!  Thank you so much for leaving such a generous review, and for the continuous support of us here!  Super grateful. 😊

review_questions.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: Eden is the continuation of my favorite açaí spot, Spoons. BUT, it now has amazing coffee too! The staff are always awesome, and one of the co-owners is always available in the store to talk to. Very great place for coffee or açaí bowls. Try the DJ Queen B next time you're there! :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Jen we love having you here!  Thank you so much for taking the time to leave such a kind review.  😊
reviews_data.review_text: This place is an absolute gem and passes all the hippy crunchy tests. Clean and transparent ingredients. Amazing vibes and LAURA the owner is just the sweetest most welcoming queen and all the baristas are just awesome. JUST GOOOO ❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Robert for taking the time to leave a review!  We love it too— come back and see us soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Love this spot!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Carol!  Thank you so much for your Spoons loyalty and for taking the time to leave a review.  

Our build your own bowl is priced congruently with all of our Spoons locations, and you are correct, we do offer additional base options here at Eden!

I located your delivery check and did notice that you chose to omit many of the included build your own toppings that did result in a smaller bowl.  

We definitely want to make sure you always have a great experience with us, and if you would like to contact me directly I would love to invite you back in!

Best,
Laura

laura@spoons.com
reviews_data.review_text:
Updated review:
Shout out to Laura, the owner, for turning a not so good experience into a great one! She reached out for feedback and invited me back in to give them another try. This time I had the nut butter toast and egg bites along with a mini bowl. Everything was so good, but the best part is I ran into Laura while picking up my food, and she was just as courteous irl. It’s clear she’s passionate about her stores and sets a high bar. I look forward to coming back to try more of the menu!

Original review:
I am a frequent customer of Spoons, so when I saw they opened this sister restaurant with an expanded menu I was excited to give it a try. I ordered a BYO bowl off their app. It comes with 2 bases, but every other topping costs extra. Sadly, when my bowl arrived it wasn’t even halfway full. The taste was fine, but I was disappointed in the overall experience.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dorothy for taking the time to leave a review!  We agree!!!! Grateful for the kind words and the review.
reviews_data.review_text: The acai bowls are on a whole different level - amazing combination of flavors. And the salted maple latte is divine. If you love the salty and sweet combination, you definitley need to try it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Rebecca!
reviews_data.review_text: The chicken sausage egg bites were delightful, and my coffee was delicious. The service was extremely upbeat and friendly, all around it was a great way to start my day!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Andrew!  Thanks for the kind review.  Can’t wait for you to come back in for the crepes! 😊
reviews_data.review_text:
Coffee was delicious. Egg bites were just okay. Don’t think they are worth the price.
Will definitely return to try the crapes and bowls
Very cute atmosphere

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Erica!  So glad you are here. ❤️
reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful service, food and coffee! Will be back lots :) New favorite spot for sure!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ellen for coming by and taking the time to leave such a kind review!  Can’t wait to see you again. 😉
reviews_data.review_text: So happy Eden is finally open in Carmel Commons. The coffee is legit—don’t sleep on the real caramel latte (Go half sweet, it has a subtle savory note and is SO good). Haven’t tried the food yet, but the menu looks great. The owners are lovely and clearly care about quality and ingredients. Amazing to finally have a real coffee shop in South Charlotte!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Sarah so much!  Love that you found a spot that feels like home.
reviews_data.review_text: A great place to "work from home." So yummy, and the coffee is great.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Fabian!  I am so sorry we missed you!  With the Charlotte “snow and ice storms” 😉, and following requests by the local authorities to stay off the roads we did halt business operations all day.  We made every attempt to communicate that to our customer base, and truly apologize that you were not notified.  I would love to invite you back in with your family to try us now that the city is back open, and the sun is shining!  If you are open to connecting directly you can email me at laura@spoons.com.  

Thank you!
Laura
reviews_data.review_text: I came woth my family all the way to try the food , but they didnt notify it was close . We Lost time . You guys should mark the place as closed the days you not open .

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Niyana for stopping in and for taking the time to leave us a generous review!  We hope to see you soon— we will keep the coffee flowing for you- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing atmosphere and kind staff. The coffee and crepes were awesome

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Yeah Montaya!!!! Thank you so much for the review and we are so glad you keep coming back.  You have picked some winners to try and looking forward to what you chose next….. 😊

Super grateful for the kind words and your business.
reviews_data.review_text: Nice quiet place with lots to offer. I have been here twice!! I had the Strawberry Matcha Latta, Suga baby and Pretty in pink. Everything was delicious!!! I will be back to try something else. The pricing matches the area it is in so no complaints.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kathy!  We love seeing you-
reviews_data.review_text: My new happy place! And the coffee is perfection!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi!  Thank you for taking the time to leave a review!  You are correct, they are protein shakes, yes frozen so very similar to a smoothie for sure!  We do assemble the shake ingredients prior to blending to take the wait out of the process for the customer.  We currently use Truvani Organic Whey Protein which does include dairy, HOWEVER, we have ordered their plant based protein to give customers an option and will add the protein at the end for those that prefer dairy free. While we have many dairy free options on both the coffee and acai bowl side of Eden, there are many just like you that do also prefer plant based for their protein shakes as well.   We are happy to make that a reality and apologize that we missed the mark with you this evening!
reviews_data.review_text: I was riding down the 51 and googled Smoothie near me and this place came up Eden, I was less than five minutes away, but I did have to turn around and come back. I was excited to try this new place that just opened up in November 2025, but they had no dairy free options for smoothies as a matter fact I’m not even sure if they have smoothies it’s listed as shakes so maybe that can be considered the same as Smoothie but there was no dairy free options. The mix is pre- made and you can’t order without whey protein. A wasted trip and I was a little disappointed, but I did get to meet and talk with some of the owners.🥲

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Shirley for the sweet review and for coming in this morning!  What a fantastic way to start our day.  See you soon! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Good Morning, A must you try. You should run over there and support this wonderful place. Beautiful Humans and Tasty Acai Bowls. Such a Comfortable and welcoming shop.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much!  What a spectacular review - so glad to be in the neighborhood- we all really love it and seeing you all daily.  😊
reviews_data.review_text: This restaurant opening in my neighborhood is one of the best things that’s happened to me in the last 3 years! Food and service is impeccable. I always leave there in a better mood. The owner is extremely involved and hands-on, always smiling and bringing the energy. Cannot praise this place enough. A great addition to the neighborhood!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Carly!  Appreciate the kind review- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Best açaí bowl I’ve had in a long time. The salts caramel matcha was amazing. Def will be back to try more menu items. Friendly and fast service

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Annatasshia for stopping in today!  Appreciate the generous feedback- see you soon!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area

reviews_data.review_text: Drove by and just spotted this new place. Coffee was great and atmosphere was clean and bright. The star was definitely the egg soufflés bites.A wonderful fresh cooked taste with clean ingredients. Way better than Starbucks. Plenty of outlets too! Will be coming back to work and have some coffee for sure.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Marrissa!  Great picks— can’t wait to see you soon and appreciate the review so much.
reviews_data.review_text: I had the heart throb acai bowl and the sugar cookie caramel crumble latte, they were both to die for! I can't wait to go back and try other items, the menu and ingredients are top notch. 🙌🏻

reviews_data.owner_answer: Christian that is so awesome!!!  Thank you so much.  Come in and see us next time- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Very tasty - had a great "Champ" bowl and the "Pretty In Pink" smoothie... both were top notch! Didn't stop in (wasn't in store) but can vouch 100% for the actual products they serve.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Ashley!  Cannot wait to see you again!  Appreciate the kind words and generous review.
reviews_data.review_text: My husband and I stopped by on a whim and I have got to say, the vanilla latte is fantastic, my husband loved his matcha latte, and I got the Berried Treasure bowl. Seriously delicious and I love that all of their ingredients are clean in everything they make. They pride themselves in that and it shows! It is not easy living with multiple allergies, but they are so allergen conscious even on their menu where it is distinctly shown under each menu item. From one entrepreneur to another, I salute you 🫡 Laura was so welcoming and I love what she and her husband are doing with the place 🫶🏻🥰

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for stopping in and for the review!
reviews_data.review_text: Eden is AMAZING! Best Açaí bowl I’ve ever had! The champ bowl is amazing! Hot food and coffee are also delicious and everything is organic. Cannot recommend enough!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kristen for stopping by and for the kind review!
reviews_data.review_text: Place was delicious! I came here for açaí bowls and a latte and it was exactly what I was looking for. Finding açaí bowls that aren’t too sweet can be a challenge. This place reminded me of a healthy cafe in LA !

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Carolyn!  Loved meeting you and your family and can’t wait to see you all again.  So grateful you found us.
reviews_data.review_text: We found this place due to a Nextdoor post from the owner’s mom and I’m so glad we found it. The best avocado toast I’ve had. Super fresh and delicious. My kids loved their crepes and my daughter enjoyed her matcha. So happy we live nearby so we can return often.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the generous review!  So glad you came in and loved the Bananarama!  I remember you traveled all the way from Uptown- and appreciate your dedication and commitment to quality and health.  Well done-
reviews_data.review_text: Loved the Bananarama  smoothie — creamy, naturally sweet, and super fresh. The space feels calm and bright, making it a great stop to pause and recharge. Quality ingredients and a peaceful vibe — highly recommend! The owner and team are warm, welcoming, and make the experience feel genuinely personal.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Stephanie!  We loved having you in.  🤍
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely loved our experience today! The coffee was amazing, as was the food. I got the Real Caramel Latte and the Chicken, Sausage, Cheddar Egg Soufflés. The owner and staff were so friendly!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Marion for the kind review!  So nice to see you again and super excited to meet your dad as well!  Grateful for your loyalty and business- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Laura and her team were amazing! We were welcomed right away, given recommendations, and they even brought our drinks out to us. The dining area is open and aesthetically pleasing, and the bathrooms are just as nice. Highly recommend for anyone who appreciates clean, high-quality ingredients.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Shawn!  We loved having you -
reviews_data.review_text: Acai bowl was great and grabbed a coffee on the way out. Service was A+ and helpful

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the review!  We love the bathrooms too! 😉
reviews_data.review_text: Super cute atmosphere, my mocha is delicious. My husband got the dirty chai and loved it. Daughter got the carnival ride smoothie bowl. Bougie restroom to boot. Highly recommend.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dr. Lee!  Appreciate the review! 😊
reviews_data.review_text: This place just opened and it’s great! We all loved the food we got and the service was friendly and prompt. Good food, good location and healthy!

reviews_data.owner_answer: This was so nice!!!!  We are so happy to be here and thanks for taking the time to leave a review.
reviews_data.review_text:
SO awesome and an answer to prayers! EVERY single item at Eden is organic, healthy and so delicious. Truly thankful for the dedication of this team to provide a beautiful atmosphere with healthy and delicious options for everyone!
⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Heather for coming in and for the AWESOME review!  So glad you enjoyed it- 😊

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Everything was delicious and meticulously prepared, from the organic coffee & espresso, crepes and Raw Crunch Bars to the decadent (yet somehow still healthy) bowls of acai, pitaya (dragon fruit), my favorite Reese's Crunch Protein Bar and more! Even after just a cappuccino and a bowl (mine was the Legend) on our first visit, it kept our hungry bellies happy for hours and hours - definitely a full meal and not just a dessert or snack.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Melissa!  We are so happy to be in the neighborhood!
reviews_data.review_text: Nice addition to the area. They have acai bowls, chia pitaya, smoothies, egg souflee and coffee!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Claire for the kind review!  Can’t wait to see you again- 😊
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious, fresh and healthy bowls AND great coffee!! I’ll be a regular for sure!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Cole for the great review!!
reviews_data.review_text: Healthy Food, Great Coffee, Good vibes

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Sophie!
reviews_data.review_text: Yummy bowls. Great environment and friendly staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the 5 stars and generous review!😊
reviews_data.review_text: Good coffee, tasty food, clean ingredients and friendly staff. Highly recommend.
